Uses of Class
com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core.ConcurrentLazyFactory

  • Uses of ConcurrentLazyFactory in com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core that return ConcurrentLazyFactory 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static <T extends AutoCloseable>
    ConcurrentLazyFactory<T>    		 ConcurrentLazyFactory.create​(Supplier<T> supplier)
    Creates a new ConcurrentLazyFactory that disposes its value by invoking close().
    static <T> ConcurrentLazyFactory<T> ConcurrentLazyFactory.create​(Supplier<T> supplier, Consumer<T> disposer)
    Creates a new ConcurrentLazyFactory.
